title: UNOKA Compatible for Dymo Label Tape Waterproof 12mm x 4m Multiple Color, Dynamo Refill for DYMO LetraTag LT-100H LT-100T 200B XR 110T, 91201 91202 91203 91204 91205
features: Labelling Tape: Refills for dymo label tape waterproof plastic, 12 mm x 4 m, Black Text on Mixed Color Label, 91201 (White), 91202(Yellow) 91203(Red) 91204(Green) 91205(Blue)
Label Printer Tape: Compatible with Phomemo P12 and Dymo LetraTag LT-100H, LT-100H Plus, LT-100T, LT-100T Plus, LT-110T, 200B, QX 50, XR, XM, 2000 Label Maker
Label Maker Plastic: Dynamo label tape refills are self-adhesive, abrasion-resistant, strong adhesion, easy-to-peel, split backing
EASY TO USE: LT-100h Label Machine compatibly work with dymo labels through thermal transfer printing technology, no need for ink or toner
Letratag Mixed Tape: Marking and categorizing items or files for easy identification and organization
